title: Out on a Lim
overview: Limmie, an ex high school football star, learns that life after the limelight is full of hardships. His friend Gunny, a notorious street hustler, finds out that going legit is easier said than done. Together they discover that one bad decision can leave you stuck OUT ON A LIM.
